title: In /Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config, verify branch/commit existence, whether commit 1c8023c7 is on feature/phase0-handoff-pipeline, and whether there is evidence it was pushed. Use local git evidence only unless remote check is necessary. Return concise findings. Do not edit files.
summary_text: Independent review: **not yet high-level production-acceptance** for Kernel dynamic selection because observability/consistency is incomplete. 1. What must be true to “work at a high level” with codex+glm+specialist dynamic selection: - `scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh` must produce a matrix that enforces `main/assist` resolution, codex/glm baseline inclusion, and optional specialist lanes, rather than static fixed lanes. - `scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh` must prove execution routing per selected provider (`execute_codex_model`, `execute_glm_model`, `execute_gemini_model`, optional lanes) and append execution attempts/notes for each selected run. - `runtime-ledger` + workspace/auth evidence must record bootstrap/route integrity so a run can be reconstructed from ledger entry to provider outputs and auth state. - A minimum health condition should hold: codex+glm are active for kernel sessions, specialist lane is attempted only when selected, and failures are explicit with fallback rationale. - Any optional specialist (`cursor-cli`, `copilot-cli`, `gemini-cli`, Grok/XAI) intended for contractual operation must have end-to-end evidence, not just model defaults. 2. Highest-priority gaps: - **No runtime evidence for Grok-API (xai/grok) execution**, despite scripts defaulting `xai_model=grok-4`; `runtime-ledger` has no `grok`/`xai` provider usage keys, so this requirement is currently configuration-only, not proved at runtime. - **Cursor CLI is frequently marked `state: not-ready`** in auth evidence, e.g. `.../auth-evidence/adhoc_MacBook-Pro-M5-5_kernel-workspace_42806_run_20260402T093910_43539/cursor-cli.json`, so specialist coverage depends on unavailable cursor state and is not stable. - **Latest canonical run in ledger has missing run receipts** (`reason/receipt_path/workspace_receipt_path` are `null` for run `adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:27858:run:20260406T170458:29315` in `[.fugue/kernel-state/runtime-ledger.json]`), undermining end-to-end auditability. - **Remaining process obligations are still open**: unchecked items in `[.fugue/pre-implement/issue-9501-todo.md]` indicate incomplete evidence discipline (`direct quote`, `research summary`, `decide`), which weakens independent acceptance.
